vehicles.variant_name: HF Deluxe HF 100 - Drum Kick Alloy - OBD 2B
vehicles.description: The Hero HF Deluxe is a budget commuter motorcycle known for its rock-solid reliability and exceptional fuel efficiency. With a no-frills design and a proven 97.2cc engine, it is one of India's most trusted entry-level two-wheelers for daily urban commuting.

variants.name: HF Deluxe HF 100 - Drum Kick Alloy - OBD 2B

vehicles.description: The Hero Splendor Plus is a cultural icon of reliability and thrift in the Indian motorcycle market. One of the world's best-selling two-wheelers, it prioritises utility and low ownership costs with a robust 97.2cc engine, wide service network, and excellent fuel efficiency.

variants.name: Splendor Plus Drum Brake I3S - OBD 2B
Splendor Plus I3S - Black and Accent Edition - OBD 2B

vehicles.description: The Hero Splendor Plus Xtec blends the legendary Splendor's reliability with modern-day essentials. It adds a fully digital console, Bluetooth alerts, and a USB charger to the proven commuter formula, delivering both practicality and contemporary connectivity for everyday riders.

technical_specifications.features: Bluetooth alerts, USB charger, Digital console

vehicles.description: The Hero Super Splendor Xtec is a 125cc commuter motorcycle that brings modern conveniences to a reliable platform. It features Bluetooth connectivity, a USB charger, and a fuel-efficient engine with i3S start-stop technology, making it a practical and tech-forward choice for daily commuters.

technical_specifications.features: Bluetooth connectivity, USB Charger, Real-time Mileage Indicator, Start-Stop System

vehicles.description: The Hero Passion Plus is a trusted commuter motorcycle designed for students and office-goers who require affordable and dependable daily transportation. It delivers consistent 97.2cc performance with excellent fuel economy and low maintenance costs, backed by Hero's extensive service network.

The Hero Glamour is a stylish 125cc commuter motorcycle that balances modern design with practical performance. It offers smooth power delivery for city commuting and short highway trips with a 5-speed gearbox, dependable engineering, and a smart aesthetic that stands out in the segment.

The Hero Glamour Xtec upgrades the standard Glamour with technology-focused additions including i3S idle stop-start system and a more refined engine output. It combines the commuter reliability of the Glamour with enhanced fuel efficiency features for tech-savvy daily riders.

technical_specifications.features: i3S Technology

vehicles.description: The Hero Glamour X 125 is a segment-first commuter motorcycle featuring cruise control, three ride modes (Eco/Road/Power), and a colour TFT display with Bluetooth and turn-by-turn navigation. It represents a major leap in technology for the 125cc segment, combining ride-by-wire technology with all-LED lighting and everyday practicality.

technical_specifications.features: Cruise Control, Three Riding Modes (Eco/Road/Power), Colour TFT Display, Bluetooth, Navigation, LED

vehicles.description: The Hero Xtreme 125R is a sporty street commuter that combines sharp styling with capable performance in the 125cc segment. It features projector LED headlamps, a front disc brake with ABS on higher variants, and responsive handling — making it a premium choice for young urban riders.

technical_specifications.features: Projector LED headlamps, Single-channel ABS

vehicles.description: The Hero Xtreme 160R is a naked street bike that delivers impressive performance with a 163.2cc engine and aggressive styling. It balances sporty handling with practical everyday usability, featuring a front disc with ABS and LED lighting, making it appealing for both young riders and daily commuters.

The Hero Xtreme 160R 4V is a performance-oriented naked street bike equipped with segment-first features including ride-by-wire, cruise control, and USD front forks. Its 4-valve 163.2cc engine delivers sharper performance, while dual disc brakes with ABS and a premium digital display round out its comprehensive tech package.

technical_specifications.features: Ride-by-wire, Cruise Control, USD forks, Digital display

vehicles.description: The Hero Xtreme 250R is an aggressive naked street bike powered by a 249cc engine producing 29.5 bhp. It features an all-LED setup, digital console, dual disc brakes with ABS, and a 6-speed gearbox — delivering punchy acceleration and balanced dynamics for both city riding and highway cruising.

technical_specifications.features: LED headlamp, Digital console

vehicles.description: The Hero XPulse 200 4V is a capable adventure motorcycle designed for both city commuting and serious off-road exploration. With a 4-valve 199.6cc engine, long-travel suspension, high ground clearance, and a digital instrument cluster with navigation, it offers exceptional off-road capability and trail-ready performance.

technical_specifications.features: Digital instrument cluster with navigation, LED lights, Long-travel suspension, High ground clearance

vehicles.description: The Hero XPulse 210 is a liquid-cooled adventure motorcycle built for both road and off-road performance. With long-travel suspension, high ground clearance, a slipper clutch, and dual disc brakes with ABS, it offers a serious adventure riding package for riders seeking versatile all-terrain capability.

technical_specifications.features: Slipper clutch, Digital display, Long-travel suspension, High ground clearance

vehicles.description: The Hero Karizma XMR is a sports motorcycle with aerodynamic bodywork and a liquid-cooled 210cc engine. It features ride-by-wire, Bluetooth connectivity with turn-by-turn navigation, and dual-channel ABS — delivering a tech-rich and performance-oriented package for sport-focused riders.

technical_specifications.features: Bluetooth connectivity, Turn-by-turn navigation, Ride-by-wire

vehicles.description: The Hero Mavrick 440 is a retro-modern street bike powered by a 440cc single-cylinder engine with strong 36 Nm of torque. It features spoke wheels, dual disc brakes with ABS, a 6-speed gearbox, and a comfortable ergonomic setup — delivering effortless cruising performance at an accessible price point.

The Hero Pleasure Plus is a lightweight and easy-to-ride scooter designed for everyday urban commuting. With a 110.9cc engine, USB charging port, combined braking system, and practical storage, it offers reliable performance and convenience for daily riders at an affordable price.

technical_specifications.features: USB Charging Port

vehicles.description: The Hero Pleasure Plus Xtec is a feature-rich urban scooter that upgrades the Pleasure Plus with an LED projector headlamp, digital console with Bluetooth connectivity, and a side-stand engine cut-off for safety. It is ideal for modern city commuters who want smart technology in a lightweight, easy-to-ride package.

technical_specifications.features: LED projector headlamp, Digital console with Bluetooth, USB charging port, Side-stand engine cut-off

vehicles.description: The Hero Destini 125 is a practical 125cc scooter that delivers smooth and reliable performance for both city rides and longer commutes. Featuring i3S start-stop technology, USB charging, external fuel filling, and a boot light, it offers strong value-for-money in the 125cc scooter segment.

technical_specifications.features: USB charging port, External fuel filling, i3S technology

vehicles.description: The Hero Destini Prime is a budget-friendly 125cc scooter with smooth acceleration and decent power for daily commuting. It features i3S start-stop technology, USB charging, external fuel cap, a boot light, and LED position lamps — making it a well-equipped entry into the 125cc segment.

technical_specifications.features: USB Charging Port, Boot light, Semi-digital instrument cluster, Service reminder, i3S technology, LED position lamps

vehicles.description: The Hero Xoom 110 is a sporty 110cc scooter with attractive design and city-friendly performance. It features a cornering bending light, USB charging port, digital meter, and i3S idle stop-start mode — delivering nimble city riding with crisp acceleration and practical everyday convenience.

technical_specifications.features: USB charging port, Digital meter, Cornering bending light, i3S mode

vehicles.description: The Hero Xoom 125 is a performance-oriented 125cc scooter that rides almost like a motorcycle but retains scooter convenience. Segment-first sequential LED turn indicators, connected navigation technology, 14-inch alloy wheels for highway stability, and a refined engine make it a standout in the 125cc scooter category.

technical_specifications.features: Sequential LED winkers, Connected tech, Boot light, Multifunction key slot

vehicles.description: The Hero Xoom 160 is a premium maxi-scooter with one of the best-looking designs in its segment. It features keyless start with Bluetooth connectivity, a front disc brake with ABS, USB charging port, and a 156cc engine — offering a compelling blend of style, comfort, and modern technology.

technical_specifications.features: Keyless start, Bluetooth connectivity, Digital speedometer, USB charging port

vehicles.description: The Hero Maestro Edge 110 is a practical and comfortable 110cc scooter with a refined engine that performs well over bad roads. It offers external fuel filling, USB charging, alloy wheels, and a combined braking system — making it a reliable and feature-packed everyday commuter scooter.

technical_specifications.features: External fuel filling, USB charging

vehicles.description: The Hero Maestro Edge 125 is Hero's flagship 125cc scooter offering a refined engine and practical daily-use features. It comes with a front disc brake, external fuel filler cap, i3S start-stop technology, and Bluetooth on the ZX variant — sitting as a premium offering above the Destini 125.

technical_specifications.features: External fuel filling, Bluetooth (ZX variant), i3S, USB charging

vehicles.description: The Hero XPulse 200 is an adventure-touring motorcycle designed for explorers who need a capable off-road machine. With long-travel suspension, high ground clearance, LED lighting, and dual disc brakes with single-channel ABS, it was a popular choice for riders seeking adventure at an accessible price.

technical_specifications.features: Long-travel suspension, High ground clearance, LED lights

vehicles.description: The Hero XPulse 200T is a trail-touring variant of the XPulse series, blending off-road DNA with touring-friendly ergonomics. It features long-travel suspension, dual disc brakes with single-channel ABS, and a road-biased setup suited for riders who want adventure capability on daily commutes.

technical_specifications.features: Trail-touring styling, Long-travel suspension
